features.title: Analytical family membership freeze
features.description: Freeze the canonical analytical family to the declared aggregate and group_by verbs only.

features.title: Analytical runtime/docs/export parity
features.description: Keep runtime dispatch, docs builders, and default package exports aligned with the canonical analytical verb family.

features.title: AsyncAPI mount surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete AsyncAPI JSON mount surface projected by app and router owners.

features.title: AsyncAPI payload surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete AsyncAPI document payload as a first-class documentation surface.

features.title: AsyncAPI UIX surface
features.description: Tracks the requested human-viewable AsyncAPI UIX surface; current concrete package exposes the payload but not a dedicated UIX.

features.title: Binding-driven REST and JSON-RPC ingress materialization
features.description: Track binding-driven concrete ingress materialization for REST and JSON-RPC without transport-owned semantic dispatch.

features.title: build_asyncapi_spec helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_asyncapi_spec as the concrete helper that materializes the AsyncAPI payload surface.

features.title: build_handlers helper surface
features.description: Tracks the private authoring build_handlers helper surface and concrete handler materialization behavior for mapped models.

features.title: build_json_schema_bundle helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_json_schema_bundle as the concrete helper that materializes the JSON Schema bundle payload surface.

features.title: build_lens helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_lens as the concrete helper that materializes tigrbl-lens UI HTML for the OpenRPC UIX surface.

features.title: build_openapi helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_openapi as the concrete helper that materializes the OpenAPI payload surface.

features.title: build_openrpc_spec helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_openrpc_spec as the concrete helper that materializes the OpenRPC payload surface.

features.title: build_rest helper surface
features.description: Tracks the private authoring build_rest helper surface and concrete REST router materialization behavior.

features.title: build_swagger helper surface
features.description: Tracks build_swagger as the concrete helper that materializes Swagger UI HTML for the OpenAPI UIX surface.

features.title: Declared-surface docs extension schema

features.description: Tracks supported documentation outputs and metadata ownership for OpenAPI, OpenRPC, AsyncAPI, and JSON Schema, including ordinary route mounts for documentation endpoints.

features.title: Error parity, validation parity, and response structure
features.description: Recover REST/JSON-RPC error parity, validation parity, and response-envelope structure under the canonical projection rules defined in adr/ADR-0031 and specs/status-auth-and-error-parity.md.

features.title: EventStreamResponse concrete SSE class
features.description: Tracks EventStreamResponse as the concrete SSE response class with event framing and event-stream headers.

features.title: Gate C retained spec/security conditions are satisfied and machine-checked in the checkpoint tree
features.description: Tracks conformance surface GATE-009: Gate C retained spec/security conditions are satisfied and machine-checked in the checkpoint tree. Category: Governance. Evidence roots: `docs/conformance/CURRENT_TARGET.md`, `docs/conformance/CURRENT_STATE.md`, `docs/conformance/gates/GATE_C_CONFORMANCE_SECURITY.md`, `docs/conformance/RFC_SECURITY_EVIDENCE_MAP.md`, `docs/conformance/audit/2026/p11-gate-c/README.md`, `tools/ci/validate_gate_c_conformance_security.py`

features.title: Canonical HTTP route registration
features.description: Tracks the binding-first REST decorator surface and imperative route normalization owned by tigrbl_concrete, including explicit HttpRestBindingSpec defaults, ordinary documentation routes, and the neutral __tigrbl_route_ops__ spec-graph carrier.

features.title: JSON-RPC batch framing
features.description: Tracks JSON-RPC batch request ordering, per-item result/error isolation, and batch envelope behavior as integration-governed runtime semantics.

features.title: Endpoint-keyed JSON-RPC multiplexing
features.description: Track endpoint-keyed JSON-RPC binding identity, concrete endpoint mounting, and default endpoint ownership in tigrbl_core.

features.title: JSON Schema mount surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete JSON Schema bundle mount surface projected by app and router owners.

features.title: JSON Schema payload surface

features.title: JSON Schema UIX surface
features.description: Tracks the requested human-viewable JSON Schema UIX surface; current concrete package exposes the payload but not a dedicated UIX.

features.title: mount_lens helper surface
features.description: Tracks mount_lens as the concrete mount helper that exposes tigrbl-lens for the OpenRPC UIX surface.

features.title: mount_swagger helper surface
features.description: Tracks mount_swagger as the concrete mount helper that exposes Swagger UI for the OpenAPI UIX surface.

features.title: Multipart form preservation
features.description: Preserve form fields and multipart values without transport-specific loss during parsing.

features.title: OpenAPI 3.1.0 emission is explicit and verified
features.description: Tracks conformance surface OAS-001: OpenAPI 3.1.0 emission is explicit and verified. Category: Docs & Runtime. Evidence roots: `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_system_docs_builders.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_phase5_spec_snapshots.py`

features.title: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 is explicit in emitted docs via `jsonSchemaDialect`

features.title: OpenAPI mount surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete OpenAPI JSON mount surface projected by app and router owners.

features.title: OpenAPI payload surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete OpenAPI document payload as a first-class documentation surface.

features.title: OpenAPI UIX surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete human-viewable OpenAPI UIX surface currently satisfied through Swagger-backed rendering.

features.title: OpenRPC mount surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete OpenRPC JSON mount surface projected by app and router owners.

features.title: OpenRPC payload surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete OpenRPC document payload as a first-class documentation surface.

features.title: OpenRPC UIX surface
features.description: Tracks the concrete human-viewable OpenRPC UIX surface currently satisfied through tigrbl-lens rendering.

features.title: Operator-surface framing and multipart semantics
features.description: Track stable streaming, SSE, multipart, and upload semantics across the governed operator surface.

features.title: Operator-surface smoke/runtime parity
features.description: Preserve the same governed operator-surface semantics in docs-backed smoke paths and live runtime execution.

features.title: Op extension surface
features.description: Tracks the governed op extension surface as a separate SSOT family spanning canonical verb families, custom ops, and public projection of op-facing contracts.

features.title: Custom op extension contract
features.description: Tracks the governed custom-op extension point distinct from the canonical verb families.

features.title: Default canonical OLTP op family
features.description: Tracks the frozen default canonical OLTP op family as part of the governed op extension surface.

features.title: Op public projection
features.description: Tracks public projection of op-facing contracts and helpers through the tigrbl facade.

features.title: Realtime and transfer family membership freeze
features.description: Freeze the canonical realtime and transfer family to the declared publish, subscribe, tail, upload, download, append_chunk, send_datagram, and checkpoint verbs only.

features.title: Realtime and transfer runtime/docs/export parity
features.description: Keep runtime dispatch, docs builders, and default package exports aligned with the canonical realtime and transfer verb family.

features.title: JSON-RPC 2.0 current-target surface is verified
features.description: Tracks conformance surface RPC-001: JSON-RPC 2.0 current-target surface is verified. Category: Protocol / RPC Runtime. Evidence roots: `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_jsonrpc_openrpc.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/i9n/test_jsonrpc_batch_behavior.py`

features.title: OpenRPC 1.2.6 emission and mounted `/openrpc.json` surface are verified
features.description: Tracks conformance surface RPC-002: OpenRPC 1.2.6 emission and mounted `/openrpc.json` surface are verified. Category: Protocol / RPC Runtime. Evidence roots: `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_jsonrpc_openrpc.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/i9n/test_mountable_openrpc_uvicorn.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_phase5_spec_snapshots.py`

features.title: Mounted Lens / OpenRPC UI is verified
features.description: Tracks conformance surface RPC-003: Mounted Lens / OpenRPC UI is verified. Category: Protocol / RPC Runtime. Evidence roots: `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_jsonrpc_openrpc.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/i9n/test_mountable_lens_uvicorn.py`, `pkgs/core/tigrbl_tests/tests/unit/test_phase5_spec_snapshots.py`

features.title: SSE event framing
features.description: Emit WHATWG event-stream bodies with framing compatible with produced event boundaries.

features.title: Stream chunk order preservation
features.description: Preserve stream chunk ordering and multi-chunk body emission rather than collapsing chunks into one accidental body.

features.title: StreamingResponse concrete stream class
features.description: Tracks StreamingResponse as the concrete ordered byte-stream response class for sync and async chunk sources.

features.title: Declared-surface cross-projection parity
features.description: Keep OpenAPI and OpenRPC declared-surface metadata aligned for shared transport declarations.

features.title: Swagger OpenAPI UIX
features.description: Tracks Swagger as the concrete OpenAPI UIX implementation surface.

features.title: tigrbl-lens OpenRPC UIX
features.description: Tracks tigrbl-lens as the concrete OpenRPC UIX implementation surface.

features.title: Tigrbl test suite coverage intake
features.description: Temporary coverage owner for executable tests whose governing feature has not yet been narrowed to a concrete SSOT feature.

features.title: Transport-dispatch governance track setup
features.description: Create the governed transport-dispatch track resources, boundary, validator, and setup evidence before implementation delivery starts.

features.title: Uniform diagnostics UIX surface
features.description: Tracks a uniform UIX that can display documentation payloads and system diagnostics together; current concrete package does not yet provide this consolidated UIX.

features.title: Uploaded file runtime contract
features.description: Preserve uploaded filename, content-type, and body access for runtime handlers.

features.title: WebSocket concrete runtime class
features.description: Tracks WebSocket as the concrete websocket runtime surface projected by tigrbl_concrete.

features.title: Executors do not perform transport matching
features.description: Track removal of HTTP path and JSON-RPC method matching from executors so they only execute compiled plans.

features.title: KernelPlan and atoms own transport lookup and matching
features.description: Track the return of transport lookup, endpoint resolution, and operation matching to the compiled KernelPlan and atom chain.

features.title: Remove non-conforming transport bypasses
features.description: Track removal of app-local HTTP dispatch and other transport bypasses that avoid the kernel-owned dispatch path.

features.title: REST and JSON-RPC parity through the shared dispatch path
features.description: Track restoration of REST and JSON-RPC semantic parity through the shared transport-dispatch path without test-only relaxation.
